{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219265733C54A44C77E38541813"}"},"total":707},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7399952374363652926","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很有新意，唯美的爱情故事不是用傻白甜演绎的，女主很有智慧，男主人设也很好。文章又不乏诙谐搞笑的人物，现代版的番外也很好。又是一部天花板小说，强烈推荐！可能前面章节内容感觉不是特别新颖，但越看越好看，本人觉得它好过那些百万字的书！👍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723002560,"group_id":"7312872564907314238","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ZLt4EQ98hGZXh0LG4B/iEe/WWEI32pTkP6eYGgkWQQ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2555706659571741","user_name":"阿美利加的善良之神"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2555706659571741","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1651599532,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7312872564907314238","book_info":{"abstract":"【纯古言+1V1双洁甜宠+无穿无重+有嘴+爱女+双向奔赴】
【美貌果敢公主VS心机茶味男主，日常+宫斗朝堂，文风轻松。】
【女主有仇当场报，男主步步为营，男德楷模。】
连城身为唯一的嫡公主，生而尊贵，就是有个胡说八道的毛病，时不时发作。
最近发作时，被太常少卿谢寂赶上。
“谢少卿真好看，满脸皱纹的老死太可惜，不如本宫做一个冰棺，将你藏进去？”
“你看你叫谢寂，字未眠，注定这一生孤单，晚上是不是寂寞得睡不着觉？”
“不如让本宫解下你的腰带，如何？”
她撩拨够了，毛病也好了，转身就跑。
谢寂眼里的小公主：美丽无双，爱看龙阳话本，想杀我，想撩我……我可以！
但公主好像没这意思，他相思难眠，梦中尽是小公主的身影。
后来，大家都在纳闷：谢少卿明明能靠才华吃饭，却偏要靠脸。
问连城喜欢谢寂什么，连城答：他够骚，骚得有姿态，有腔调。
问谢寂喜欢连城什么，谢寂答：对公主一见钟情，蓄谋已久。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o5a94b5691148df979d2f55529cf0b186~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"东南形胜","author_id":"","book_id":"7312872564907314238","book_name":"驸马一撒娇，公主魂会飘","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5820人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":83,"name":"公主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=83&name=公主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":476,"name":"双向奔赴","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=476&name=双向奔赴&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7312872569260999230","read_count":"5820","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"363476"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"166","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,公主,双洁,甜宠,双向奔赴","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/073f7f716268d0d501e93b29ea7714c7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362817&x-signature=E9OcAZO7zg2YUEru0AxsToOkQCY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2747029588284963","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"983439"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219265733C54A44C77E38541813"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_c
